dict.string: Freshli uses your camera to scan barcodes, scan receipts, and identify fresh ingredients with Freshli Vision. If you enable the optional Gaze-Adaptive UI accessibility feature in Settings, Freshli also uses the TrueDepth camera via ARKit face tracking purely on-device to compute where you are looking on screen — no face data is ever stored, transmitted, or shared.
Freshli accesses your photos to add images to pantry items and community listings.
Freshli saves shared recipe images and impact cards to your photo library.
Freshli uses your location to show nearby community food listings and set pickup locations.
